astrology.element.0.name: Fire
astrology.element.1.name: Earth
astrology.element.2.name: Air
astrology.element.3.name: Water
astrology.modality.0.name: Cardinal
astrology.modality.0.role: Begins the season — the spark that starts
astrology.modality.1.name: Fixed
astrology.modality.1.role: Holds the season — the strength that endures
astrology.modality.2.name: Mutable
astrology.modality.2.role: Ends the season — the wisdom that releases
astrology.sign.0.brief: The spark that begins — raw courage to exist
astrology.sign.0.name: Aries
astrology.sign.1.brief: The earth that endures — patient cultivation of beauty
astrology.sign.1.name: Taurus
astrology.sign.10.brief: The wave that carries — freedom in service of all
astrology.sign.10.name: Aquarius
astrology.sign.11.brief: The ocean that dissolves — unity beyond separation
astrology.sign.11.name: Pisces
astrology.sign.2.brief: The breath between — connecting through language
astrology.sign.2.name: Gemini
astrology.sign.3.brief: The shell that protects — feeling as a form of knowing
astrology.sign.3.name: Cancer
astrology.sign.4.brief: The fire that sustains — the courage to shine
astrology.sign.4.name: Leo
astrology.sign.5.brief: The hand that mends — wholeness through discernment
astrology.sign.5.name: Virgo
astrology.sign.6.brief: The scales that balance — beauty as equilibrium
astrology.sign.6.name: Libra
astrology.sign.7.brief: The depth that transforms — death as doorway
astrology.sign.7.name: Scorpio
astrology.sign.8.brief: The arrow that seeks — meaning beyond the horizon
astrology.sign.8.name: Sagittarius
astrology.sign.9.brief: The mountain that stands — authority earned through time
astrology.sign.9.name: Capricorn
astrology.tpl.detail: %1$s Sun: %2$s. %3$s. Keywords: %4$s. Shadow: %5$s. Element: %6$s (%7$s). Modality: %8$s (%9$s). Moon in %10$s: emotional nature is %11$s.
astronomy.phase.0.brief: The dark seed — invisible, full of potential, everything begins here
astronomy.phase.0.guidance: Set intentions, start projects, rest and reflect in the darkness
astronomy.phase.0.name: New Moon
astronomy.phase.0.theme: Beginnings, seed planting, intention setting, the dark of renewal
astronomy.phase.1.brief: The first sliver — intention made visible, the young light gathering strength
astronomy.phase.1.guidance: Take the first step, gather resources, push through initial resistance
astronomy.phase.1.name: Waxing Crescent
astronomy.phase.1.theme: Emerging intention, first commitment, the courage to begin
astronomy.phase.2.brief: The half-lit choice — light and dark in equal measure, the crossroads
astronomy.phase.2.guidance: Make decisions, overcome obstacles, commit to the direction chosen
astronomy.phase.2.name: First Quarter
astronomy.phase.2.theme: Challenge, decision, the crisis of action
astronomy.phase.3.brief: Almost full — the final preparation, polishing before the peak
astronomy.phase.3.guidance: Refine the plan, adjust based on feedback, trust the process
astronomy.phase.3.name: Waxing Gibbous
astronomy.phase.4.brief: The full light — everything illuminated, nothing hidden, the peak
astronomy.phase.4.guidance: Celebrate completion, see clearly, harvest what was planted at the new moon
astronomy.phase.4.name: Full Moon
astronomy.phase.5.brief: The generous decline — the light begins to give itself away
astronomy.phase.5.guidance: Share what you've learned, give back, express gratitude for the harvest
astronomy.phase.5.name: Waning Gibbous
astronomy.phase.6.brief: The half-lit release — light and dark again equal, but now the light is leaving
astronomy.phase.6.guidance: Let go of what no longer serves, forgive, clear space for the new
astronomy.phase.6.name: Last Quarter
astronomy.phase.6.theme: Release, forgiveness, clearing, the crisis of letting go
astronomy.phase.7.brief: The last whisper — the thinnest light before the dark, the wisdom of surrender
astronomy.phase.7.guidance: Rest deeply, surrender control, prepare for the coming darkness
astronomy.phase.7.name: Waning Crescent
astronomy.phase.7.theme: Surrender, rest, preparation for the void, the balsamic phase
astronomy.planet.0.archetype: The Trickster-Messenger — quicksilver mind, the psychopomp who bridges realms
astronomy.planet.0.brief: The swift messenger — closest to the Sun, never far from the source of light
astronomy.planet.0.domain: Communication, intellect, commerce, the messenger between worlds
astronomy.planet.0.name: Mercury
astronomy.planet.1.archetype: The Beloved — the mirror of desire, beauty as a force that civilizes
astronomy.planet.1.brief: The morning and evening star — the brightest planet, whose light is borrowed
astronomy.planet.1.domain: Love, beauty, harmony, values, artistic creation
astronomy.planet.1.name: Venus
astronomy.planet.2.archetype: The Mother — the living world that sustains all observation of the cosmos
astronomy.planet.2.brief: The pale blue dot — the only planet we know that looks back at the sky
astronomy.planet.2.domain: Home, embodiment, the body, the ground we stand on
astronomy.planet.2.name: Earth
astronomy.planet.3.archetype: The Warrior — the red force that fights for what matters
astronomy.planet.3.brief: The red planet — iron-rusted, blood-colored, named for the god of war
astronomy.planet.3.domain: Action, drive, conflict, courage, the will to assert
astronomy.planet.3.name: Mars
astronomy.planet.4.archetype: The King — the largest body in the solar system after the Sun, protector and judge
astronomy.planet.4.brief: The great benefic — more massive than all other planets combined
astronomy.planet.4.domain: Expansion, wisdom, generosity, law, the great benefic
astronomy.planet.4.name: Jupiter
astronomy.planet.5.archetype: The Elder — the ringed boundary, the lesson that cannot be avoided
astronomy.planet.5.brief: The ringed teacher — beautiful and severe, the lord of time and consequence
astronomy.planet.5.domain: Structure, limitation, time, discipline, the great teacher
astronomy.planet.5.name: Saturn
astronomy.planet.6.archetype: The Awakener — the lightning bolt of change, the force that disrupts to liberate
astronomy.planet.6.brief: The tilted rebel — rolling on its side, the planet that breaks every rule
astronomy.planet.6.domain: Revolution, originality, sudden insight, the unexpected
astronomy.planet.6.name: Uranus
astronomy.planet.7.archetype: The Mystic — the dissolving ocean where boundaries cease to exist
astronomy.planet.7.brief: The blue dreamer — farthest major planet, where the solar system fades into mystery
astronomy.planet.7.domain: Imagination, transcendence, illusion, the oceanic unconscious
astronomy.planet.7.name: Neptune
astronomy.tpl.detail_retro: RETROGRADE: apparent backward motion — the planet's themes turn inward for review.
astronomy.tpl.detail_retrograde: RETROGRADE: apparent backward motion — the planet's themes turn inward for review.
buddhist.kalpa.0.description: Worlds arise from emptiness — matter condenses, beings take form
buddhist.kalpa.0.meaning: The cosmic breath inward — creation as inevitable arising
buddhist.kalpa.0.name: Formation
buddhist.kalpa.1.description: Beings live, die, and are reborn — the wheel turns
buddhist.kalpa.1.meaning: The present era — sentient experience in all its suffering and beauty
buddhist.kalpa.1.name: Existence
buddhist.kalpa.2.description: Worlds dissolve through fire, water, or wind
buddhist.kalpa.2.meaning: The cosmic breath outward — all conditioned things are impermanent
buddhist.kalpa.2.name: Destruction
buddhist.kalpa.3.description: Vast darkness between worlds — nothing remains
buddhist.kalpa.3.meaning: The great rest — potential without form, like dreamless sleep
buddhist.kalpa.3.name: Emptiness
buddhist.month.11.meaning: Month of the Sangha — community of awakening
buddhist.month.11.observance: Magha Puja — Sangha Day, 1250 monks gathered
buddhist.month.12.meaning: Month of completion — cycle prepares to renew
buddhist.month.2.meaning: The most sacred month — triple anniversary
buddhist.month.4.meaning: Month of the first teaching — the Wheel turns
buddhist.month.5.meaning: Month of withdrawal — monastics enter retreat
buddhist.month.8.meaning: Month of generosity — dana and gratitude
buddhist.month.9.meaning: Month of the path — quiet walking
buddhist.uposatha.0.meaning: An ordinary day in the cycle
buddhist.uposatha.0.name: No Observance
buddhist.uposatha.1.meaning: Darkness as potential — the seed moment before renewal
buddhist.uposatha.1.name: New Moon Observance
buddhist.uposatha.1.practice: Monastics recite Patimokkha; laity observe 8 precepts
buddhist.uposatha.2.meaning: Illumination — the Buddha's birth, enlightenment, and parinibbana all on full moons
buddhist.uposatha.2.name: Full Moon Observance
buddhist.uposatha.2.practice: Most important — full Patimokkha recital, intensive practice
buddhist.uposatha.3.meaning: Growing light — effort and aspiration building
buddhist.uposatha.3.name: Waxing Half-Moon
buddhist.uposatha.4.meaning: Releasing — wisdom of impermanence, letting go
buddhist.uposatha.4.name: Waning Half-Moon
chinese.animal.0.brief: First in the cycle — the clever mind that finds opportunity in chaos
chinese.animal.0.name: Rat
chinese.animal.1.brief: The strength that plows through — patient endurance conquers all
chinese.animal.1.name: Ox
chinese.animal.10.brief: The faithfulness that anchors — loyalty as the highest virtue
chinese.animal.10.name: Dog
chinese.animal.11.brief: The abundance that overflows — generosity without calculation
chinese.animal.11.name: Pig
chinese.animal.2.brief: The roar that awakens — fearless action in service of justice
chinese.animal.2.name: Tiger
chinese.animal.3.brief: The grace that disarms — softness as a form of power
chinese.animal.3.name: Rabbit
chinese.animal.4.brief: The only mythical animal — the dream of transcendence made manifest
chinese.animal.4.name: Dragon
chinese.animal.5.brief: The coil that strikes true — deep wisdom beneath a still surface
chinese.animal.5.name: Snake
chinese.animal.6.brief: The gallop that liberates — freedom as a way of being
chinese.animal.6.name: Horse
chinese.animal.7.brief: The heart that creates — beauty born from sensitivity
chinese.animal.7.name: Goat
chinese.animal.8.brief: The mind that plays — genius disguised as mischief
chinese.animal.8.name: Monkey
chinese.animal.9.brief: The voice that calls truth — precision in all things
chinese.animal.9.name: Rooster
chinese.element.0.expression: Through creativity, vision, and upward movement
chinese.element.0.name: Wood
chinese.element.1.name: Fire
chinese.element.2.expression: Through grounding, nurture, and practical care
chinese.element.2.name: Earth
chinese.element.3.expression: Through refinement, letting go, and sharp focus
chinese.element.3.name: Metal
chinese.element.4.expression: Through flow, stillness, and the power of yielding
chinese.element.4.name: Water
chinese.tpl.detail: %1$s %2$s: %3$s. Strengths: %4$s. Challenges: %5$s. Best with: %6$s. Element: %7$s (%8$s) — %9$s. Year %10$d of 60.
gregorian.day.0.brief: The Moon's day — intuition, emotion, the tides within
gregorian.day.0.name: Monday
gregorian.day.1.brief: Mars' day — courage, action, the warrior's resolve
gregorian.day.1.name: Tuesday
gregorian.day.1.origin: Old English Tiwesdaeg (Tyr's day, Norse Mars)
gregorian.day.2.brief: Mercury's day — communication, craft, the trickster's wit
gregorian.day.2.name: Wednesday
gregorian.day.2.origin: Old English Wodnesdaeg (Woden's day, Norse Mercury)
gregorian.day.3.brief: Jupiter's day — expansion, abundance, the thunder god's generosity
gregorian.day.3.name: Thursday
gregorian.day.3.origin: Old English Thunresdaeg (Thor's day, Norse Jupiter)
gregorian.day.4.brief: Venus' day — love, beauty, the goddess of desire
gregorian.day.4.name: Friday
gregorian.day.4.origin: Old English Frigedaeg (Freya's day, Norse Venus)
gregorian.day.5.brief: Saturn's day — discipline, structure, the taskmaster's lesson
gregorian.day.5.name: Saturday
gregorian.day.6.brief: The Sun's day — vitality, sovereignty, the center of all orbits
gregorian.day.6.name: Sunday
gregorian.month.1.brief: The month of doorways — one face looks back, one looks forward
gregorian.month.1.name: January
gregorian.month.1.origin: Janus — two-faced god of beginnings, gates, and transitions
gregorian.month.10.brief: The eighth month — the world turns inward as the light contracts
gregorian.month.10.name: October
gregorian.month.10.origin: Octo (eight) — the eighth month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.month.11.brief: The ninth month — the dead are honored as the year grows old
gregorian.month.11.name: November
gregorian.month.11.origin: Novem (nine) — the ninth month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.month.11.quality: Late autumn, remembrance, preparation for dark
gregorian.month.12.brief: The tenth month — in the deepest dark, the ancient Romans feasted and the sun was reborn
gregorian.month.12.name: December
gregorian.month.12.origin: Decem (ten) — the tenth month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.month.12.quality: Winter solstice, Saturnalia, the return of light
gregorian.month.2.brief: The month of cleansing — the last fires of purification before new growth
gregorian.month.2.name: February
gregorian.month.2.quality: Late winter, purification, preparation for spring
gregorian.month.3.brief: The month of Mars — the old Roman year began here, with war and planting alike
gregorian.month.3.name: March
gregorian.month.3.origin: Mars — god of war and agriculture, the Roman new year
gregorian.month.3.quality: Spring equinox, awakening, aggressive new growth
gregorian.month.4.brief: The month of opening — everything that was closed begins to unfold
gregorian.month.4.name: April
gregorian.month.4.origin: Aperire (to open) — the earth opens, buds unfold
gregorian.month.5.brief: The month of growth — the earth goddess whose name means 'she who is great'
gregorian.month.5.name: May
gregorian.month.5.origin: Maia — goddess of growth, mother of Mercury
gregorian.month.6.brief: The month of marriage — the queen of heaven blesses the longest days
gregorian.month.6.name: June
gregorian.month.6.origin: Juno — queen of the gods, patron of marriage
gregorian.month.7.brief: The month of Caesar — named for the man who remade time itself
gregorian.month.7.name: July
gregorian.month.7.origin: Julius Caesar — reformed the calendar, deified after death
gregorian.month.8.brief: The month of Augustus — the emperor who demanded a month as grand as July
gregorian.month.8.name: August
gregorian.month.8.origin: Augustus Caesar — first Roman emperor, 'the revered one'
gregorian.month.8.quality: Late summer, harvest begins, empire at zenith
gregorian.month.9.brief: The seventh month — still carrying its old number though it is now the ninth
gregorian.month.9.name: September
gregorian.month.9.origin: Septem (seven) — the seventh month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.season.0.brief: The season of becoming — everything that slept now wakes
gregorian.season.0.name: Spring
gregorian.season.0.quality: Expansive — energy rises, seeds germinate, days lengthen
gregorian.season.1.brief: The season of being — the world at maximum brilliance
gregorian.season.1.name: Summer
gregorian.season.1.quality: Radiant — energy at peak, light dominates, life in full bloom
gregorian.season.2.brief: The season of letting go — beauty in decay, richness in release
gregorian.season.2.name: Autumn
gregorian.season.2.quality: Contracting — energy turns inward, fruit ripens, leaves fall
gregorian.season.2.theme: Harvest, release, gratitude for what grew
gregorian.season.3.brief: The season of rest — what appears dead is dreaming
gregorian.season.3.name: Winter
gregorian.season.3.quality: Still — energy withdrawn to roots, silence, gestation in darkness
gregorian.season.3.theme: Rest, depth, the hidden seed, essential stillness
hd.auth.0.brief: Decisions emerge from emotional patience â there is no truth in the now
hd.auth.0.name: Emotional
hd.auth.0.process: Ride the emotional wave â clarity comes over time, never in the moment
hd.auth.0.signal: Wait for emotional clarity across highs and lows before deciding
hd.auth.1.brief: The body knows before the mind â respond to life through sacral sounds
hd.auth.1.name: Sacral
hd.auth.1.process: Listen to the gut response â an immediate uh-huh or uhn-uhn
hd.auth.1.signal: A visceral, in-the-body yes or no that bypasses the mind
hd.auth.2.brief: Survival intelligence speaks in the moment â trust the first instinct
hd.auth.2.name: Splenic
hd.auth.2.process: Trust the spontaneous knowing â the spleen speaks once and softly
hd.auth.2.signal: A quiet, instantaneous hit of intuition that does not repeat
hd.auth.3.brief: The heart center drives commitment â only promise what the ego can sustain
hd.auth.3.name: Ego
hd.auth.3.process: Honor what the heart truly wants â willpower aligned with desire
hd.auth.3.signal: A sense of what you have the will and heart to commit to
hd.auth.4.brief: Identity speaks through the voice â talk it through with trusted others
hd.auth.4.name: Self-Projected
hd.auth.4.process: Hear yourself speak your truth â the voice reveals direction
hd.auth.4.signal: Listen to what comes out of your mouth when you speak about the decision
hd.auth.5.brief: No defined inner authority â decisions emerge through dialogue and environment
hd.auth.5.name: Mental
hd.auth.5.process: Use the mind as a sounding board â no inner authority, rely on environment
hd.auth.5.signal: Discuss with others and notice what feels right in different environments
hd.auth.6.brief: The moon's transit through all 64 gates reveals clarity â patience is everything
hd.auth.6.name: Lunar
hd.auth.6.process: Wait through a full 28-day lunar cycle â sample all transits before deciding
hd.auth.6.signal: After a full moon cycle, notice which option consistently felt right
hd.center.0.defined: Consistent mental pressure to think, question, and wonder
hd.center.0.name: Head
hd.center.0.open: Amplifies others' inspiration â overwhelmed by questions that aren't yours
hd.center.0.question: Am I trying to answer everybody else's questions?
hd.center.1.defined: Fixed way of processing and conceptualizing information
hd.center.1.name: Ajna
hd.center.1.open: Open to all ways of thinking â wisdom is mental flexibility
hd.center.1.question: Am I trying to convince everyone I'm certain?
hd.center.2.defined: Consistent voice and capacity to manifest through expression
hd.center.2.name: Throat
hd.center.2.open: Adapts communication to the audience â pressure to speak or act prematurely
hd.center.2.question: Am I trying to attract attention?
hd.center.3.defined: Fixed sense of identity, direction, and love
hd.center.3.name: G Center
hd.center.3.open: Shape-shifts identity depending on environment and companions
hd.center.3.question: Am I still looking for love and direction?
hd.center.4.defined: Reliable willpower and capacity for material promises
hd.center.4.name: Heart
hd.center.4.open: Inconsistent willpower â wisdom is not needing to prove self-worth
hd.center.4.question: Am I still trying to prove myself?
hd.center.5.defined: Consistent intuition, immune response, and survival awareness
hd.center.5.name: Spleen
hd.center.5.open: Amplifies health and fear signals â holds on to what should be released
hd.center.5.question: Am I still holding on to what isn't good for me?
hd.center.6.defined: Sustainable life force and work energy â the Generator's engine
hd.center.6.name: Sacral
hd.center.6.open: Inconsistent energy â wisdom is knowing when enough is enough
hd.center.6.question: Do I know when enough is enough?
hd.center.7.defined: Emotional wave that brings depth, passion, and feeling to experience
hd.center.7.name: Solar Plexus
hd.center.7.open: Empathic amplifier â absorbs and magnifies the emotions of others
hd.center.7.question: Am I avoiding confrontation and truth?
hd.center.8.defined: Consistent adrenal pressure that drives action and momentum
hd.center.8.name: Root
hd.center.8.open: Amplifies stress â pressure to hurry and be free of the pressure
hd.center.8.question: Am I in a hurry to be free of the pressure?
hd.profile.0.brief: The deeply experiential researcher â builds certainty through investigation and breakdowns
hd.profile.0.conscious: Investigator â driven to build a secure foundation of knowledge
hd.profile.0.unconscious: Martyr â learns through trial and error, discovering what doesn't work
hd.profile.1.brief: The networked scholar â deep research shared through close community
hd.profile.1.conscious: Investigator â needs a solid knowledge foundation before acting
hd.profile.1.unconscious: Opportunist â opportunities flow through personal networks and relationships
hd.profile.10.brief: The wise recluse â three-phase maturation with natural gifts that emerge alone
hd.profile.10.conscious: Role Model â three life phases: trial, observation, embodiment
hd.profile.10.unconscious: Hermit â unconscious natural gift that flourishes in solitude
hd.profile.11.brief: The experienced optimist â double trial process that ultimately models authentic living
hd.profile.11.conscious: Role Model â three-phase life journey toward authentic embodiment
hd.profile.11.unconscious: Martyr â unconscious drive to discover through trial and error
hd.profile.2.brief: The naturally gifted friend â talent emerges when called by the right people
hd.profile.2.conscious: Hermit â possesses natural talent that needs calling out by others
hd.profile.2.unconscious: Opportunist â life moves through relationship networks
hd.profile.3.brief: The reluctant savior â called from isolation to deliver practical solutions
hd.profile.3.conscious: Hermit â natural gifts that require solitude to develop
hd.profile.3.unconscious: Heretic â universalizing projections attract practical solutions from others
hd.profile.4.brief: The resilient problem-solver â experience-born wisdom that others seek out
hd.profile.4.conscious: Martyr â learns through bonds made and broken, trial and error
hd.profile.4.unconscious: Heretic â projected upon as having universal answers
hd.profile.5.brief: The experiential sage â hard-won wisdom that eventually becomes living example
hd.profile.5.conscious: Martyr â discovers through experimentation and broken bonds
hd.profile.5.unconscious: Role Model â three life phases: trial (to 30), observer (30-50), exemplar (50+)
hd.profile.6.brief: The trusted mentor â community-rooted guidance that matures into role model leadership
hd.profile.6.conscious: Opportunist â influence flows through close community bonds
hd.profile.6.unconscious: Role Model â three life phases: trial, retreat to the roof, then embodied wisdom
hd.profile.7.brief: The fixed foundation networker â once the foundation is set, it does not change
hd.profile.7.conscious: Opportunist â life direction comes through relationships
hd.profile.7.unconscious: Investigator â unconscious need for deep, authoritative foundation
hd.profile.8.brief: The practical general â deeply researched solutions delivered to meet projections
hd.profile.8.conscious: Heretic â others project universal solutions onto you
hd.profile.8.unconscious: Investigator â unconscious need to deeply research before delivering
hd.profile.9.brief: The called savior â natural talent projected upon by others, needing retreat
hd.profile.9.conscious: Heretic â projected upon as having the answer
hd.profile.9.unconscious: Hermit â unconscious natural talent that needs withdrawal to recharge
hd.tpl.detail: Type: %1$s. Strategy: %2$s. Signature: %3$s. Not-Self: %4$s. Aura: %5$s. Authority: %6$s â %7$s. Profile: %8$s (%9$s). %10$s / %11$s. Sun Gate %12$d: %13$s (%14$s). %15$s.
hd.type.0.aura: Closed and repelling â pushes energy outward to initiate
hd.type.0.brief: The initiator who sets things in motion â designed to act independently and inform others
hd.type.0.name: Manifestor
hd.type.1.aura: Open and enveloping â draws life toward it magnetically
hd.type.1.brief: The life force of the planet â designed to find the right work through gut response
hd.type.1.name: Generator
hd.type.2.aura: Open and enveloping â draws life while accelerating toward action
hd.type.2.brief: The multi-passionate builder â responds first, then initiates with sustainable energy
hd.type.2.name: Manifesting Generator
hd.type.3.aura: Focused and absorbing â penetrates into the other's aura to see deeply
hd.type.3.brief: The guide who sees others clearly â designed to direct energy, not generate it
hd.type.3.name: Projector
hd.type.4.aura: Resistant and sampling â reflects the health of the community
hd.type.4.brief: The mirror of the community â designed to evaluate by reflecting the world through a full lunar cycle
hd.type.4.name: Reflector
hebrew.month.1.brief: Month of miracles and liberation — Passover
hebrew.month.1.name: Nisan
hebrew.month.10.name: Tevet
hebrew.month.11.brief: New Year of Trees — Tu B'Shevat
hebrew.month.11.name: Shevat
hebrew.month.12.brief: Month of Purim — hidden miracles revealed
hebrew.month.12.name: Adar
hebrew.month.13.brief: Leap month — Purim celebrated here in leap years
hebrew.month.13.name: Adar II
hebrew.month.2.brief: Month of natural healing — counting the Omer
hebrew.month.2.name: Iyar
hebrew.month.3.name: Sivan
hebrew.month.4.brief: Month of the broken tablets — seeing beyond
hebrew.month.4.name: Tammuz
hebrew.month.5.name: Av
hebrew.month.6.brief: Month of returning — preparation for the new year
hebrew.month.6.name: Elul
hebrew.month.7.brief: Month of the High Holidays — Rosh Hashanah, Yom Kippur, Sukkot
hebrew.month.7.name: Tishrei
hebrew.month.8.brief: The bitter month — no holidays, only rain prayers
hebrew.month.8.name: Cheshvan
hebrew.month.9.brief: Month of dreams and lights — Hanukkah
hebrew.month.9.name: Kislev
hebrew.tpl.detail: %1$s is the month of %2$s. Its letter is %3$s, its tribe is %4$s, its sense is %5$s. %6$s.
hindu.tithi.1.brief: First day of the bright fortnight -- new beginnings
hindu.tithi.1.name: Shukla Pratipada
hindu.tithi.10.name: Shukla Dashami
hindu.tithi.11.brief: Day of spiritual discipline -- Ekadashi fast
hindu.tithi.11.name: Shukla Ekadashi
hindu.tithi.12.name: Shukla Dvadashi
hindu.tithi.13.name: Shukla Trayodashi
hindu.tithi.14.brief: Day before fullness -- tension and preparation
hindu.tithi.14.name: Shukla Chaturdashi
hindu.tithi.15.name: Purnima
hindu.tithi.16.brief: First day of waning -- the turn inward begins
hindu.tithi.16.name: Krishna Pratipada
hindu.tithi.17.name: Krishna Dvitiya
hindu.tithi.18.name: Krishna Tritiya
hindu.tithi.19.name: Krishna Chaturthi
hindu.tithi.2.name: Shukla Dvitiya
hindu.tithi.20.name: Krishna Panchami
hindu.tithi.21.name: Krishna Shashthi
hindu.tithi.22.name: Krishna Saptami
hindu.tithi.23.name: Krishna Ashtami
hindu.tithi.24.name: Krishna Navami
hindu.tithi.25.name: Krishna Dashami
hindu.tithi.26.brief: Day of spiritual discipline -- Ekadashi fast
hindu.tithi.26.name: Krishna Ekadashi
hindu.tithi.27.name: Krishna Dvadashi
hindu.tithi.28.name: Krishna Trayodashi
hindu.tithi.29.name: Krishna Chaturdashi
hindu.tithi.3.brief: Akshaya Tritiya -- prosperity that never diminishes
hindu.tithi.3.name: Shukla Tritiya
hindu.tithi.30.brief: New Moon -- the still point before rebirth
hindu.tithi.30.name: Amavasya
hindu.tithi.4.brief: Day of obstacles and their removal
hindu.tithi.4.name: Shukla Chaturthi
hindu.tithi.5.name: Shukla Panchami
hindu.tithi.6.brief: Day of divine youth and energy
hindu.tithi.6.name: Shukla Shashthi
hindu.tithi.7.name: Shukla Saptami
hindu.tithi.8.brief: Day of transformation -- neither good nor ill
hindu.tithi.8.name: Shukla Ashtami
hindu.tithi.9.name: Shukla Navami
iching.hex.1.image: Heaven upon heaven â the sage strengthens himself ceaselessly
iching.hex.1.judgment: Pure creative force initiates all things
iching.hex.1.name: The Creative
iching.hex.10.image: Heaven above the lake â the sage distinguishes high and low
iching.hex.10.judgment: Treading upon the tiger's tail with care and propriety brings success
iching.hex.10.name: Treading
iching.hex.11.image: Earth above heaven â the ruler channels the way of heaven for the people
iching.hex.11.judgment: Heaven and earth unite â the small departs, the great approaches
iching.hex.11.name: Peace
iching.hex.12.image: Heaven above earth â the sage withdraws into inner worth
iching.hex.12.judgment: Heaven and earth do not communicate â decline and obstruction
iching.hex.12.name: Standstill
iching.hex.13.image: Heaven with fire â the sage organizes clans and distinguishes things
iching.hex.13.judgment: True fellowship among people through shared principles
iching.hex.13.name: Fellowship
iching.hex.14.image: Fire above heaven â the sage curbs evil and promotes good
iching.hex.14.judgment: Fire in heaven â supreme success through understanding what is great
iching.hex.14.name: Great Possession
iching.hex.15.image: Mountain within earth â the sage reduces what is too much and increases what is too little
iching.hex.15.judgment: Modesty creates success â the mountain within the earth
iching.hex.15.name: Modesty
iching.hex.16.image: Thunder over earth â the ancient kings made music to honor merit
iching.hex.16.judgment: Thunder over earth â enthusiasm moves all things
iching.hex.16.name: Enthusiasm
iching.hex.17.image: Thunder within the lake â the sage rests at nightfall
iching.hex.17.judgment: Adapting to the time and following with sincerity brings success
iching.hex.17.name: Following
iching.hex.18.image: Wind at the foot of the mountain â the sage stirs up the people and nourishes virtue
iching.hex.18.judgment: What has been corrupted through neglect can be restored through effort
iching.hex.18.name: Work on the Decayed
iching.hex.19.image: Earth above the lake â the sage teaches and shelters without limit
iching.hex.19.judgment: The great approaches with willing condescension toward the small
iching.hex.19.name: Approach
iching.hex.2.image: Earth upon earth â the sage supports all beings with broad virtue
iching.hex.2.judgment: Pure receptive force nourishes all things
iching.hex.2.name: The Receptive
iching.hex.20.image: Wind over earth â the ancient kings visited the regions to teach the people
iching.hex.20.judgment: The sage gazes upon the divine meaning beneath appearances
iching.hex.20.name: Contemplation
iching.hex.21.image: Thunder and lightning â the ancient kings enforced the laws with clarity
iching.hex.21.judgment: Energetic biting through obstacles restores unity
iching.hex.21.name: Biting Through
iching.hex.22.image: Fire at the foot of the mountain â the sage brightens governance without daring to judge
iching.hex.22.judgment: Beauty adorns form but substance must remain within
iching.hex.22.name: Grace
iching.hex.23.image: Mountain resting on the earth â the ruler strengthens the foundation of the people
iching.hex.23.judgment: The dark forces peel away what has been built â accept and wait
iching.hex.23.name: Splitting Apart
iching.hex.24.image: Thunder within the earth â the ancient kings closed the passes at solstice
iching.hex.24.judgment: After decay, the turning point â the one light returns below
iching.hex.24.name: Return
iching.hex.25.image: Thunder under heaven â the ancient kings nourished all beings in accord with the season
iching.hex.25.judgment: Acting from genuine nature without ulterior motive brings success
iching.hex.25.name: Innocence
iching.hex.26.image: Heaven within the mountain â the sage studies the ancients to cultivate character
iching.hex.26.judgment: Firm restraint of great creative power builds reserves of strength
iching.hex.26.name: Great Taming
iching.hex.27.image: Thunder at the foot of the mountain â the sage is careful with words and temperate in eating
iching.hex.27.judgment: Attending to what nourishes body and mind brings good fortune
iching.hex.27.name: Nourishment
iching.hex.28.image: The lake rises above the trees â the sage stands alone without fear
iching.hex.28.judgment: The ridgepole bends â extraordinary measures are needed in extraordinary times
iching.hex.28.name: Great Excess
iching.hex.29.image: Water flows on and reaches the goal â the sage teaches through repeated practice
iching.hex.29.judgment: Repeated danger teaches sincerity of heart â flow like water
iching.hex.29.name: The Abysmal
iching.hex.3.image: Thunder and rain â the sage brings order from chaos
iching.hex.3.judgment: Birth pangs of new endeavors require perseverance
iching.hex.3.name: Difficulty at the Beginning
iching.hex.30.image: Fire doubled produces great brightness â the sage illuminates all regions
iching.hex.30.judgment: Luminous clarity depends on something to cling to â accept dependence
iching.hex.30.name: The Clinging
iching.hex.31.image: The lake upon the mountain â the sage receives others with openness
iching.hex.31.judgment: Mutual attraction between the yielding and the firm brings union
iching.hex.31.name: Influence
iching.hex.32.image: Thunder and wind reinforce each other â the sage stands firm in his direction
iching.hex.32.judgment: Enduring consistency in one's way of life brings success
iching.hex.32.name: Duration
iching.hex.33.image: Mountain under heaven â the sage keeps the inferior at a distance with dignity
iching.hex.33.judgment: Strategic withdrawal before the advancing dark preserves strength
iching.hex.33.name: Retreat
iching.hex.34.image: Thunder above heaven â the sage treads no path contrary to propriety
iching.hex.34.judgment: Great power combined with righteousness moves heaven and earth
iching.hex.34.name: Great Power
iching.hex.35.image: The sun rises over the earth â the sage brightens his bright virtue
iching.hex.35.judgment: The bright sun rises over the earth â willing service brings rapid advance
iching.hex.35.name: Progress
iching.hex.36.image: The sun sinks into the earth â the sage veils his brightness in dealings with the multitude
iching.hex.36.judgment: In times of darkness the sage conceals his light to endure adversity
iching.hex.36.name: Darkening of the Light
iching.hex.37.image: Wind comes from fire â the sage speaks with substance and acts with consistency
iching.hex.37.judgment: The well-ordered family is the foundation of all social order
iching.hex.37.name: The Family
iching.hex.38.image: Fire above the lake â the sage remains individual within community
iching.hex.38.judgment: Despite outward opposition, underlying affinity makes small things possible
iching.hex.38.name: Opposition
iching.hex.39.image: Water on the mountain â the sage turns attention to self-improvement
iching.hex.39.judgment: Facing an abyss before and a mountain behind â turn inward and gather allies
iching.hex.39.name: Obstruction
iching.hex.4.image: Spring at the foot of the mountain â the sage cultivates character
iching.hex.4.judgment: The young fool seeks the teacher, not the teacher the fool
iching.hex.4.name: Youthful Folly
iching.hex.40.image: Thunder and rain arise â the sage pardons errors and forgives transgressions
iching.hex.40.judgment: When release from tension comes, return to normalcy swiftly
iching.hex.40.name: Deliverance
iching.hex.41.image: The lake at the foot of the mountain â the sage controls anger and restrains instincts
iching.hex.41.judgment: Decrease of the lower enriches the higher â sincerity in simplicity brings blessings
iching.hex.41.name: Decrease
iching.hex.42.image: Wind and thunder strengthen each other â the sage moves toward good and corrects faults
iching.hex.42.judgment: The ruler decreases self to increase the people â generous sacrifice brings benefit
iching.hex.42.name: Increase
iching.hex.43.image: The lake rises to heaven â the sage distributes blessings to those below
iching.hex.43.judgment: Resolute action brings dark matters to light â proclaim the danger openly
iching.hex.43.name: Breakthrough
iching.hex.44.image: Wind under heaven â the ruler proclaims his commands to the four quarters
iching.hex.44.judgment: The dark principle advances from below â recognize and contain it early
iching.hex.44.name: Coming to Meet
iching.hex.45.image: The lake over the earth â the sage renews his weapons to meet the unforeseen
iching.hex.45.judgment: People gather around a strong leader â prepare for the unexpected
iching.hex.45.name: Gathering Together
iching.hex.46.image: Within the earth wood grows â the sage builds great things from small beginnings
iching.hex.46.judgment: Gentle effort directed steadily upward meets with supreme success
iching.hex.46.name: Pushing Upward
iching.hex.47.image: The lake has no water â the sage risks his life to fulfill his purpose
iching.hex.47.judgment: Exhaustion of resources tests character â the sage stakes his life on following his will
iching.hex.47.name: Oppression
iching.hex.48.image: Water over wood â the sage encourages the people and counsels mutual aid
iching.hex.48.judgment: The well nourishes all without being exhausted â seek the unchanging source
iching.hex.48.name: The Well
iching.hex.49.image: Fire in the lake â the sage orders the calendar and clarifies the seasons
iching.hex.49.judgment: When the time is ripe, revolutionary change commands belief
iching.hex.49.name: Revolution
iching.hex.5.image: Clouds rise to heaven â the sage eats, drinks, and is joyful
iching.hex.5.judgment: Sincerity and patience lead to crossing the great water
iching.hex.5.name: Waiting
iching.hex.50.image: Fire over wood â the sage consolidates destiny by making his position correct
iching.hex.50.judgment: The sacred vessel transforms raw material into nourishment for the wise
iching.hex.50.name: The Cauldron
iching.hex.51.image: Repeated thunder â the sage sets things in order through fearful reflection
iching.hex.51.judgment: Shock and thunder bring fear, then laughter â the sage examines himself through awe
iching.hex.51.name: The Arousing
iching.hex.52.image: Mountains joined together â the sage does not permit thoughts to go beyond the situation
iching.hex.52.judgment: Stillness of the mountain â the sage quiets the mind and does not go beyond his position
iching.hex.52.name: Keeping Still
iching.hex.53.image: A tree on the mountain grows slowly â the sage abides in dignity and virtue
iching.hex.53.judgment: Gradual development like a tree on the mountain brings lasting results
iching.hex.53.name: Gradual Progress
iching.hex.54.image: Thunder over the lake â the sage understands the transitory in light of eternity
iching.hex.54.judgment: The younger sister follows the elder â knowing one's place brings eventual good
iching.hex.54.name: The Marrying Maiden
iching.hex.55.image: Thunder and lightning together â the sage decides lawsuits and carries out punishments
iching.hex.55.judgment: Fullness and abundance at the zenith â act now for the sun must set
iching.hex.55.name: Abundance
iching.hex.56.image: Fire on the mountain â the sage is clear and cautious in applying penalties
iching.hex.56.judgment: The traveler succeeds through smallness and adaptability, not grandeur
iching.hex.56.name: The Wanderer
iching.hex.57.image: Winds following one another â the sage spreads his commands and carries out his affairs
iching.hex.57.judgment: Persistent gentle penetration achieves what aggression cannot
iching.hex.57.name: The Gentle
iching.hex.58.image: Lakes joined together â the sage joins with friends for discussion and practice
iching.hex.58.judgment: True joy comes from inner firmness expressed with outward gentleness
iching.hex.58.name: The Joyous
iching.hex.59.image: Wind drives over the water â the ancient kings made offerings and built temples
iching.hex.59.judgment: Wind over water disperses rigid separations â use gentle means to dissolve barriers
iching.hex.59.name: Dispersion
iching.hex.6.image: Heaven and water move apart â the sage plans before acting
iching.hex.6.judgment: Inner truth and caution resolve disagreement
iching.hex.6.name: Conflict
iching.hex.60.image: Water over the lake â the sage creates number and measure to examine virtue and conduct
iching.hex.60.judgment: Proper limits bring structure â but bitter limitations should not be held to
iching.hex.60.name: Limitation
iching.hex.61.image: Wind over the lake â the sage deliberates upon punishments and delays execution
iching.hex.61.judgment: Inner truth reaches even pigs and fish â sincerity moves all beings
iching.hex.61.name: Inner Truth
iching.hex.62.image: Thunder on the mountain â the sage is reverent in conduct and sorrowful in mourning
iching.hex.62.judgment: In small matters excess is permissible â the flying bird leaves its song behind
iching.hex.62.name: Small Excess
iching.hex.63.image: Water over fire â the sage reflects on misfortune and prepares against it
iching.hex.63.judgment: All lines in their proper place â success, but vigilance against disorder
iching.hex.63.name: After Completion
iching.hex.64.image: Fire over water â the sage carefully distinguishes things and puts them in their places
iching.hex.64.judgment: The final crossing is not yet accomplished â careful discernment of forces is needed
iching.hex.64.name: Before Completion
iching.hex.7.image: Water within the earth â the sage nurtures the people and gathers strength
iching.hex.7.judgment: Discipline and just leadership organize the people
iching.hex.7.name: The Army
iching.hex.8.image: Water upon the earth â the ancient kings established their states
iching.hex.8.judgment: Union requires a central figure of sincerity
iching.hex.8.name: Holding Together
iching.hex.9.image: Wind over heaven â the sage refines outward form and virtue
iching.hex.9.judgment: Gentle restraint achieves what force cannot
iching.hex.9.name: Small Taming
iching.tpl.detail: %1$s: %2$s. The Image: %3$s. Keywords: %4$s. Upper trigram: %5$s, Lower: %6$s.
islamic.month.1.brief: Sacred month of mourning and remembrance
islamic.month.1.name: Muharram
islamic.month.10.brief: Month of celebration and voluntary fasting
islamic.month.10.event: Eid al-Fitr (1st) -- Festival of Breaking Fast
islamic.month.10.name: Shawwal
islamic.month.11.brief: Sacred month of truce and preparation for Hajj
islamic.month.11.name: Dhul Qa'dah
islamic.month.12.brief: Sacred month of pilgrimage and sacrifice
islamic.month.12.event: Hajj (8th-12th), Eid al-Adha (10th) -- Festival of Sacrifice
islamic.month.12.name: Dhul Hijjah
islamic.month.2.brief: Month of travel -- traditionally considered difficult
islamic.month.2.name: Safar
islamic.month.3.brief: Month of joy and prophetic celebration
islamic.month.3.name: Rabi al-Awwal
islamic.month.4.brief: Quiet month of reflection and growth
islamic.month.4.name: Rabi al-Thani
islamic.month.5.name: Jumada al-Ula
islamic.month.6.name: Jumada al-Thani
islamic.month.7.name: Rajab
islamic.month.8.name: Sha'ban
islamic.month.9.brief: Month of fasting, revelation, and spiritual renewal
islamic.month.9.name: Ramadan
islamic.prayer.0.meaning: Awakening -- beginning before the world stirs
islamic.prayer.0.name: Fajr
islamic.prayer.1.meaning: Remembrance -- pausing at the day's peak
islamic.prayer.1.name: Dhuhr
islamic.prayer.2.name: Asr
islamic.prayer.3.name: Maghrib
islamic.prayer.4.name: Isha
islamic.tpl.detail_sacred: This is one of the four sacred months.
kabbalah.path.0.journey: Stepping into the void with perfect trust
kabbalah.path.0.lesson: Faith requires no ground to stand on
kabbalah.path.1.journey: Channeling divine will into conscious creation
kabbalah.path.1.lesson: The creator creates by becoming transparent to creation
kabbalah.path.10.lesson: Fortune changes but passion outlasts every turning
kabbalah.path.11.lesson: Balance is not compromise â it is precision of the heart
kabbalah.path.12.lesson: The deepest discipline is to stop struggling
kabbalah.path.13.lesson: Something must die for desire to become authentic
kabbalah.path.14.lesson: Harmony manifests only when it touches the ground
kabbalah.path.15.lesson: Beauty must include darkness or it becomes a lie
kabbalah.path.16.lesson: When desire and truth collide, every false structure falls
kabbalah.path.17.lesson: The unconscious speaks in the language of what you love
kabbalah.path.18.lesson: Joy is passion that has found a body
kabbalah.path.19.lesson: The mindâs final gift: calling the soul to rise
kabbalah.path.2.journey: The long descent from crown to heart
kabbalah.path.2.lesson: Wisdom crosses the abyss only through silence
kabbalah.path.20.lesson: The scholarâs path ends where the hands begin
kabbalah.path.21.lesson: The last step: making the invisible visible
kabbalah.path.3.journey: Wisdom meeting understanding â father and mother unite
kabbalah.path.3.lesson: Creation begins where two principles embrace
kabbalah.path.4.lesson: Vision must find a heart or it remains blinding light
kabbalah.path.5.lesson: True teaching is an act of unconditional giving
kabbalah.path.6.lesson: The first choice: love or fear â always love
kabbalah.path.7.lesson: Structure without compassion becomes a prison; with it, a chariot
kabbalah.path.8.lesson: True strength is mercy that knows when to say no
kabbalah.path.9.lesson: The lamp of mercy illuminates the path inward
kabbalah.sefirah.0.brief: The unknowable origin â divine will before manifestation
kabbalah.sefirah.0.meditation: Crown â the point before thought, pure will
kabbalah.sefirah.0.name: Keter
kabbalah.sefirah.0.question: What exists before I think?
kabbalah.sefirah.1.brief: Primal wisdom â the lightning flash that begins all things
kabbalah.sefirah.1.meditation: Wisdom â the flash of insight, the father principle
kabbalah.sefirah.1.name: Chokmah
kabbalah.sefirah.1.question: What is the first spark of creation?
kabbalah.sefirah.2.brief: The great mother â understanding that shapes raw wisdom into form
kabbalah.sefirah.2.meditation: Understanding â the womb that gives form to wisdom
kabbalah.sefirah.2.name: Binah
kabbalah.sefirah.2.question: How does the infinite become finite?
kabbalah.sefirah.3.brief: Unconditional love â the outpouring of grace
kabbalah.sefirah.3.meditation: Mercy â boundless giving, expansion without limit
kabbalah.sefirah.3.name: Chesed
kabbalah.sefirah.3.question: Where must I give without condition?
kabbalah.sefirah.4.brief: Sacred restriction â strength that shapes through limitation
kabbalah.sefirah.4.meditation: Strength â necessary contraction, judgment, discipline
kabbalah.sefirah.4.name: Gevurah
kabbalah.sefirah.4.question: Where must I set boundaries?
kabbalah.sefirah.5.brief: The heart center â beauty born from the marriage of giving and restraint
kabbalah.sefirah.5.meditation: Beauty â the heart that balances mercy and judgment
kabbalah.sefirah.5.name: Tiferet
kabbalah.sefirah.5.question: How do I harmonize opposites?
kabbalah.sefirah.6.brief: The fire of eternity â passion that endures beyond reason
kabbalah.sefirah.6.meditation: Victory â endurance, artistic passion, desire
kabbalah.sefirah.6.name: Netzach
kabbalah.sefirah.6.question: What drives me to persist?
kabbalah.sefirah.7.brief: The glory of surrender â mind bowing to what is greater
kabbalah.sefirah.7.name: Hod
kabbalah.sefirah.7.question: How do I serve the truth?
kabbalah.sefirah.8.brief: The foundation â where all upper forces gather before manifesting
kabbalah.sefirah.8.meditation: Foundation â the gateway between above and below
kabbalah.sefirah.8.name: Yesod
kabbalah.sefirah.8.question: What connects my inner world to outer reality?
kabbalah.sefirah.9.brief: The kingdom of the present moment â divinity in matter
kabbalah.sefirah.9.meditation: Kingdom â the physical world, embodiment, presence
kabbalah.sefirah.9.name: Malkuth
kabbalah.sefirah.9.question: Am I fully here?
